message.content:
@startuml
title 以下流程都在refresh()方法内部

participant "AbstractApplicationContext" as A1 #D3D3D3 
participant "GenericApplicationContext" as GAC #E6E6FA  
participant "ApplicationContextAwareProcessor" as ACAP #F0FFFF   
participant "AbstractAutowireCapableBeanFactory" as AACBF #FFF8DC    
participant "DefaultListableBeanFactory" as DLBF #FFE4C5 

note over A1 :第1步
activate A1
    activate A1:A1 ->>GAC:prepareRefresh\ninitPropertySources()\ngetEnvironment()\nvalidateRequiredProperties()\nnew LinkedHashSet<>()\n泛型ApplicationEvent
    
     note left of A1#ref:#FFDEAD   \n空方法，留给子类重写
     
     
      deactivate A1
      
      


note right of A1 :第2步
        activate A1
        
         A1->AACBF:obtainFreshBeanFactory()\n refreshBeanFactory()
         
         
            
            new DefaultListableBeanFactory();setSerializationId(getId()) 
            
             return to A1;未定义变量接收返回值 getBeanFactory返回 DefaultListableBeanFactory
             
              deactivate A1



note right of A1 :第3步
           activate A1
           
          
            
               addBeanPostProcessor(new ApplicationContextAwareProcessor(this))构造器；return Application Context Aware Processor
                
                ignoreDependencyInterface(Application Event Publisher Aware.class)ignored Dependency Interfaces.add(ifo);un defined variable receives returned value register Resolvable dependency(bean Factory class bean factory params{dependency Type autowired Value}resolvable Dependencies.put());add application Listener Detector's Bean post processor compile time Aspect J ;register singleton(environment _bean_name/system_properties_bean name /system_environment_ be aname param s {be annamesingletonobject }addsinglet on () un def ined vari able rec eives ret urn ed val ue in app lication con text standard init after modify internal bean fac tory empty method leave for subcl ass override pos tp rocessb ea nf act ory(bf );deac tiv ate al l activ ated par ts end uml
